headline: Crypto Candidates Win 3 US State Primaries Overnight

article.title: Crypto-backed candidates notch wins in three US state primaries
article.summary: The crypto-aligned Fairshake PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $8 million on media to support candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah amid pushback from many criticizing “crypto billionaires.”

article.title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
article.summary: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.

headline: Ex-COO Faces Guilty Plea in $1.7B Collapse

article.title: Ex-Tricolor COO to Plead Guilty to Fraud in Firm’s Collapse
article.summary: Former Tricolor Holdings Chief Operating Officer David Goodgame told a judge that he will plead guilty to fraud charges stemming from the used-car dealer and lender’s collapse last year.

headline: Semiconductors Plummet 3% Ahead of Micron Earnings

article.title: Chipmakers Fall Anew in Run-Up to Micron’s Results: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A drop in chipmakers ahead of Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings weighed on stocks, with the results expected to provide clues on whether this year’s artificial-intelligence rally will be justified.

headline: Binance Drops EU License Bid Amid 27M User Uncertainty

article.title: Binance Withdraws MiCA License Application in Greece, Leaving EU Users in Limbo
article.summary: Crypto exchange Binance formally withdrew its MiCA license application in Greece, one week after a report said it would be denied.

headline: Crypto Scammer Gets 15 Months for $1.4M Fraud

article.title: Fake Crypto Influencer Gets 15 Months for $1.4M Telegram Staking Fraud
article.summary: Noman Saleem impersonated crypto influencers on Telegram, luring victims into a fake staking scheme before vanishing with their funds.

article.summary: Cambrian, a startup building blockchain data infrastructure for institutions and AI agents, raised $6 million in a seed funding round.

headline: Crypto Regs: 60% Favor Federal Rules Over State Laws

article.summary: The CFTC has been locked in a tug-of-war with states over who has the ultimate authority over event contracts.

article.summary: Caracas to disclose it has much more borrowing than expected after overthrow of Maduro

headline: NKorea Succession Risks Spark $1Bn Market Plunge
